message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 hide circle class ServiceFault { +code +description } interface ApiExceptionCodes <> { code description SERVICE_NETWORK_EXCEPTION SERVER_VALIDATE_EXCEPTION INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR } abstract class RuntimeException {} ServiceFault <|-- ServiceException : extends RuntimeException <|-- InternalServerException : extends InternalServerException --|> ApiExceptionCodes : uses ApiExceptionCodes .. ServerValidateException : references RuntimeError <-- ExceptionResolverFactory : creates exception_resolver_factory --> exception_resolvers[] : manages WSDLConfig *-- SoapFaultMappingExceptionHandlerRegistry : contains SoapFaultDefinitionHandlerAdapter -up- WsdlConfigurationContextProvider : depends on > Wsdl11MessageDispatcher <-down-> MessageReceiverImplementationBase : implements >> note right of "message_dispatcher" #lightyellow\nNote:\nHandles incoming SOAP messages#end note @enduml
